title: The King's Birthday Honours 2025: Overseas and International List
body: "The honours awarded in His Majesty The King’s Birthday Honours 2025 Overseas and International List include:   awards in the Order of St Michael and St George awards in the Order of the British Empire   This page also provides further information on the people being recognised with Knighthood-level (higher) awards.   Read the press release:Outstanding contributions by British nationals abroad recognised on the King’s Birthday 2025 Overseas and International Honours list.  "
